## Description

Kell's Hollow is a barnacled port wedged into a flooded caldera on the edge of {{the-shattered-reach}}. Half its streets are canals; the other half are gangplanks strung between leaning towers of salvaged hull-timber. Lanterns burn whale-blue oil against the perpetual sea-mist, and every dock charges a toll no one can quite trace.

## Recent History

The town has changed hands four times since {{the-sundering}}. Most recently {{house-veldrane}} seized the customs house and installed its own tariff, an act the free captains call the Mutiny at Kell's Hollow. Locals whisper that the older claim still stands — that {{the-drowned-court}} never truly relinquished the harbor.

## Relationships

- Nominally controlled by {{house-veldrane}}.
- Home berth of {{captain-ferocious}}, who keeps a room above the Salt Ledger tavern.
- Charted in detail on {{shattered-reach-map}}.
